project_type: Python FastAPI backend with ML analysis pipeline
build_system: uv (Python package manager), pyproject.toml for deps
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/backend && uv run python -c "from app.services.analysis.pipeline import AnalysisPipeline; print('Import OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. Run uv sync to install deps. 2. Import the new analyzer modules. 3. Run the server with 'uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000' and test via /test page.
environment_constraints: CPU-only (no GPU), OPEN_INTERNET network mode (can install packages), torch 2.12 + torchvision 0.27 already installed, CLIP/transformers NOT installed (need to add via pyproject.toml)
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: BaseAnalyzer subclass, TagResult dataclass, category=WHERE for location tags
key_patterns: BaseAnalyzer abstract class with analyze(image_path) -> list[TagResult] and warmup(). Pipeline orchestrates analyzers sequentially. Tags have category/value/confidence/bounding_box. bounding_box is JSON string field (can store lat/lon). SceneAnalyzer currently uses rule-based YOLO object detection.
directory_structure: backend/app/services/analysis/ - ML analyzers (base, face, object, scene, pipeline). backend/app/api/routes/ - FastAPI endpoints. backend/app/models/ - SQLAlchemy models. backend/app/schemas/ - Pydantic schemas. backend/static/ - test.html served at /test.
